Pregledajte prijavljene kvarove, filtrir: Browse reported issues, filter by status, and open an item for details or editing.
Od otvaranja forme do slanja prijave sti: From opening the form to sending the report takes only a few seconds. Describe the issue, add a photo if you want, and send it.
Kratko opišite kvar i, ako želite, dodaj: Briefly describe the issue and, if you want, add photos. Everything important should fit in a few quick steps.
Dodajte stan, hitnost ili fotografiju sa: Add the apartment, urgency, or a photo only if they help the manager act faster.
Pošaljite prijavu odmah, a dodatne detal: Send the report now, and you can add extra details later in a comment.
Navedite gde je problem nastao i kada st: State where the problem happened and when you noticed it.
Ako postoji hitnost, izaberite odgovaraj: If it is urgent, choose the appropriate priority.
Na primer: Lift ne radi od jutros, vrata: For example: The elevator has not worked since this morning, the doors are not closing, and other residents cannot use it.
Pošaljite osnovnu informaciju odmah, a d: Send the core information now, and add details later if needed.
Dodajte fotografiju iz galerije ili odma: Add a photo from the gallery or open the camera right away.
Fotografija često ubrzava dodelu i rešav: A photo often speeds up assignment and resolution.
Ažurirajte status, prioritet, zaduženje: Update the status, priority, assignee, and extra details in the same ticket.
Važne informacije, kratka obaveštenja i: Important information, short notices, and manager announcements are all in one place.
Objava treba da bude jasna i kratka, sa: The announcement should be clear and concise, with a publish time if it is not for immediate release.
Naslov neka bude kratak i prepoznatljiv: Keep the title short and recognizable already in the announcements list.
U prvom pasusu navedite šta stanari treb: In the first paragraph, explain what residents should know or do.
Ako nije hitno, možete sačuvati nacrt i: If it is not urgent, you can save it as a draft and publish later.
Ažurirajte sadržaj, vreme objave ili sta: Update the content, publish time, or publication status for this message.
Dodajte aplikaciju na početni ekran radi: Add the app to your home screen for quicker access and a full-screen experience.

Click the lock or info icon to the left: Click the lock or info icon to the left of the address bar.
